negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_066
prompt: The video opens with a close-up of a rectangular baking pan filled with a rich, dark brown batter, likely chocolate-based, with visible specks of nuts or chocolate chips. The surface of the batter is glossy and slightly uneven, indicating its moist and dense texture. A hand enters the frame from the upper right corner, holding a spoon or spatula, and begins to spread a light brown, creamy substance, possibly peanut butter or caramel, across the top of the batter. The hand moves methodically, creating a decorative zigzag pattern by drizzling the substance in a series of curved lines. The hand continues to add more of the spread, gradually covering more of the pan's surface, while the camera remains focused on the pan, capturing the contrast between the dark batter and the lighter spread. The video concludes with the pan almost entirely covered by the creamy substance, forming a visually appealing and textured layer on top of the batter.
